Updated Table 24: General operating conditions, Table 21: Voltage characteristics and Table 22: Current characteristics. Modified conditions in Table 27: Embedded internal reference voltage. Updated Table 28: Current consumption in Run mode, code with data processing running from Flash, Table 31: Current consumption in Run mode vs code type, code with data processing running from RAM, Table 32: Current consumption in Sleep mode, Table 33: Current consumption in Low-power run mode, Table 34: Current consumption in Low-power sleep mode, Table 35: Typical and maximum current consumptions in Stop mode and Table 36: Typical and maximum current consumptions in Standby mode. Updated Section 3.20.2: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART) and Section 3.20.4: Serial peripheral interface (SPI)/Inter- integrated sound (I2S) to mention the fact that USARTs with synchronous mode feature can be used as SPI master interfaces.
